PokerStars Hand #RC999000111: Hold'em No Limit ($1/$2 USD) - 2024/02/10 18:00:00 ET
Table 'Nebula III' 6-max Seat #2 is the button
Seat 1: HeroPlayer ($300 in chips)
Seat 2: VillainX ($250 in chips)
HeroPlayer: posts small blind $1
VillainX: posts big blind $2
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to HeroPlayer [Ac Kc]
HeroPlayer: raises $6 to $6
VillainX: calls $4
*** FLOP *** [As 7d 2h]
HeroPlayer: bets $8
VillainX: calls $8
*** TURN *** [As 7d 2h] [Kh]
HeroPlayer: bets $20
VillainX: calls $20
*** RIVER *** [As 7d 2h Kh] [5c]
HeroPlayer: bets $50
VillainX: calls $50
*** SHOW DOWN ***
HeroPlayer: shows [Ac Kc] (two pair, Aces and Kings)
VillainX: shows [Ah Qs] (a pair of Aces)
HeroPlayer collected $168 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $168 | Rake $0
